changes.description: Replaced global state with TaskScheduler class
changes.rationale: Eliminates global mutable state, enables multiple independent scheduler instances
Replaces anonymous dicts with a typed, self-documenting structure

changes.description: Replaced manual bubble sort with sorted() and key function
changes.rationale: Built-in sorted is O(n log n), cleaner, and less error-prone than hand-written bubble sort

changes.description: Used dict for O(1) task lookup by ID
changes.rationale: Replaces linear scan through list for complete_task and delete_task

changes.description: Replaced verbose loops with list comprehensions and sum()
changes.rationale: More idiomatic Python, reduces line count while maintaining clarity
